assets.label: Listing1_subject
prompt: Task: Create a high-resolution digital brand asset with fixed size 208px * 232px, fixed aspect ratio (104x116).
Background: Use the exact same solid background color from the main image (Image 1). There are no gradients, textures, soft blurs, or shadows on this layer; it is perfectly flat and consistent.
Logo: Isolate the logo exactly as it appears in the main image — position it centered horizontally within the top 30 percent of the canvas. Retain any texts in the logo, remove only the background.

Subject: Replace the subject from Image 1 with the subject provided in Image 2. Remove the background from the new subject. Anchor the new subject to the bottom edge of the canvas. Do not make any other creative changes to the subject — use it as it is.
Do not change any other creative elements — preserve the background color, logo position, and overall layout exactly as in Image 1.
The final output is premium, clean, and editorial with no visible dividers or borders.
